summary_en: FY3/27 annual dividend: 60 yen/share (50 ordinary + 10 commemorative), up 17.5 yen vs. FY3/26 (42.5 yen). Q2 interim: 20 yen. Period-end: 40 yen. Commemorative dividend honors 90th anniversary (August 2026).
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, Chino Corporation announced a 90th anniversary commemorative dividend at a board meeting. The company will mark its 90th founding anniversary on 1 August 2026. For FY3/27 (year ending March 2027), the annual dividend is forecast at 60 yen per share, comprising 50 yen ordinary dividend and 10 yen commemorative dividend. This represents an increase of 17.5 yen from FY3/26 (42.5 yen per share on a post-split basis following a 1-for-2 stock split on 1 October 2025). The FY3/27 payout comprises a mid-year interim dividend of 20 yen and a period-end dividend of 40 yen.
